hooks.prompt:
DOMAIN: dev-designer-utility
IF task involves: design tokens, colors, typography, fonts, spacing, UX strategy, or visual design systems
THEN: Read ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/SKILL.md for design system guidance.
IF_SKIP: Risk inconsistent design decisions.
VERIFY: If design decisions were made, check token grounding, contrast compliance, type scale integrity, and spacing consistency.
